message:
refactor(server): streamline unified inbox aggregation, attachment entry naming, and snippet extraction

- mail_ui: inline the message-to-API-value mapping into the JSON
  construction, simplifying render_api_unified_inbox; reformat
  register_agent call arguments for readability
- attachments: rename local variables from `entry` to use
  `..entry.clone()` pattern throughout AttachmentExplorerScreen to
  clarify ownership semantics in the borrow-heavy render paths
- search: pass `terms.as_slice()` instead of `&terms` to
  extract_snippet and extract_context_snippet_from_lines for explicit
  slice coercion in test call sites

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
